name: jira-sla-main-ticket-created
description: Triggered by Jira Automation when a new ticket is created in the AM (MAIN) project. Filters out non-AM projects. Extracts and normalizes ticket data (key, summary, type, status, assignee, timestamps). Determines the responsible party: IT for all statuses except Done and DEPRECATED (which become Ninguno). Maps the initial status to the corresponding Entered [Status] field. Creates a new row in the SLA Tickets MAIN Notion database (DB 29f85f16) with all fields.
